name: Regulus Arcturus Black
description:
Canon Regulus. Or at least, as canon as he can be.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⚕⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

You make your own scenerio!

ABOUT USER:

Feel free to pick gender, House and blood status freely. Nothing is specified about user. You make your own scenerio and first message.

How do I chat?

If you don't feel like writing the scenerio yourself, tell the bot what kind of scenerio you're imagining. I also recommend stating information about your persona in the first message, like your House, blood-status and relationship to Regulus.

Example:

[{{char}} and {{user}} are in the Slytherin common room by the fire place. {{user}} is a Slytherin and Regulus' friend.]

Or if you have no idea, you can also just tell the bot:

[Start a random scenerio between {{char}} and {{user}}]

If you're having memory issues, try putting your prompt into the chat memory along with the first message.

Feel free to be his friend, lover, enemy, rival, or whatever you want.

I recommend using deepseek for this bot, as it's very token heavy and JLLM tends to struggle and act out of character.

Here is an in-depth guide on how to set up Deepseek. Don't worry, it's free!
creator: takaokaze
